expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: Tavily-first then Confluence fallback ordering
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “1) Case focus covered…”, the run cites Phase 3 requirements encoding the ordering: reference.md has “task.json.deep_research_policy is explicitly: `tavily_first_confluence_second`” and README/SKILL references that deep research “must record the `tavily-search` pass before any `confluence` fallback”.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase3
expectations.evidence: result.md section “2) Output aligns with primary phase: phase3” lists Phase 3-specific deliverables (coverage ledger, deep research plan, Tavily reports, conditional Confluence reports, synthesis, phase3_spawn_manifest.json) and notes SKILL.md Phase 3 --post validations for these artifacts, indicating alignment to phase3.
